prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Isuzu 4JB1-TC** 2.5L turbo-diesel inline-4 (engine code: 4JB1-TC) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger, custom **Turbosmart 40mm wastegate**, and **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** for 220+ HP at 3,800 RPM and 450 Nm torque at 2,200 RPM. Supporting mods include a **Nissan CD20T intercooler** (modified to fit the Ambassador’s front grille) and a **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** with custom diesel tuning maps.

Full **polyurethane bushings** replacement (front/rear subframes, control arms) using **SuperPro 80-9000K** kit, paired with **Bilstein B14 coilovers** (custom valved for the Ambassador’s leaf-spring rear end) and **Whiteline 22mm adjustable sway bars** (front) to mitigate body roll in high-speed cornering.

Drivetrain upgrades: **Toyota HZJ79 Land Cruiser** 5-speed manual transmission (adapted via custom bellhousing) with **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily** and **Quaife ATB differential** (80% lock) in the stock Salisbury-type rear axle. Braking system features **AP Racing CP5550 calipers** (4-piston front, 2-piston rear) with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (330mm front, 300mm rear) and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Ambassador-specific widebody kit** (hand-fabricated from 1.2mm steel, extending fenders by 80mm for 245/40R17 tires) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (modeled after the 1970s Hindustan Grand roadster) and **rear diffuser** integrating dual **Borla 3.5" rolled-edge exhaust tips**.

**Full respray in Hindustan’s original 1970s ‘Ambassador Gold’ (PPG DBC999) with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the roof, pillars, and lower body cladding. Custom **LED taillights** (replicating the 1960s Hindustan Contessa design) with **Philips X-tremeUltinon Pro9000 bulbs** and **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (H4 retrofit) for modern illumination.

**Interior overhaul** with **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats** (retrimmed in **Bridge of Weir ‘Autumn Gold’ leather** to match the exterior), **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (380mm, quick-release hub), and **custom aluminum gauge pod** housing **Defi Advance BF gauges** (boost, EGT, oil pressure). Stock dashboard retained but **recovered in Alcantara** with **carbon fiber trim accents** (hand-laid by **Carbon Creations India**).
